overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a first-person walk through the Arasaka Waterfront district during golden hour. The player emerges from an underpass into a futuristic urban environment dominated by massive red highway infrastructure and the Arasaka corporate building, navigating through varying pedestrian densities and lighting conditions.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian underpass with graffiti walls

events.description: approaching the bright exit of the underpass into golden hour sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered walkway toward the bright exit

notable_agents.action: black futuristic car driving past the underpass exit
person walking toward camera exiting the underpass

entered.detail: concrete ceiling with fluorescent tube lights running lengthwise
wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art
massive red metal highway overpass framework visible at exit

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a dimly lit concrete underpass with graffiti-covered walls. The camera moves steadily forward toward a bright exit where golden hour sunlight streams in, with elevated highway infrastructure visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street corner with corporate architecture

events.description: exiting the underpass into open urban street with Arasaka building visible
turning right to follow the sidewalk along the Arasaka building facade

agents.ego_description: turning right onto the main sidewalk and walking alongside the busy street

notable_agents.action: futuristic sports car with glowing accents driving along the street
pedestrian in white jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive black corporate building with red illuminated vertical accents
illuminated red signage on the building facade
large red structural support columns for elevated highways

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the underpass into bright golden hour light, the scene opens to reveal the massive Arasaka building with its distinctive red lighting. The camera turns right along the sidewalk, passing under the shadow of elevated highway infrastructure while futuristic vehicles drive past on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy sidewalk under elevated highway infrastructure

events.description: entering section with dense pedestrian traffic and crowded sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through crowds of pedestrians on the busy waterfront sidewalk

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing walking past camera in opposite direction
purple sports car with underglow driving along the street

entered.detail: tall pole with traffic signals and digital street signs
large illuminated advertisement screen on distant building

segments.scene_description: Walking along a crowded sidewalk beneath the massive elevated highway structure, the Arasaka building now looms on the right. The area is bustling with pedestrians moving in both directions while futuristic vehicles pass on the street below the red metal framework overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection crossing with traffic control devices

events.description: crossing the street at the crosswalk while vehicles wait at the intersection
turning left to continue along the opposite sidewalk away from the main road

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the intersection and continuing along the quieter opposite sidewalk

notable_agents.action: black sedan waiting at the traffic light

entered.detail: street name sign indicating Martin Street
vertical traffic signal showing green light

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses the street at an intersection marked with traffic signals and a speed limit sign, leaving the dense crowds behind. Turning left, the path continues along a quieter sidewalk with fewer pedestrians as the Arasaka building recedes into the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway

events.description: entering covered walkway section beneath the highway overpass with neon lighting

agents.ego_description: walking through the quiet covered section with neon lights illuminating the path

entered.detail: underside of highway structure forming a covered roof over the walkway
green and white fluorescent tubes along the building edge

segments.scene_description: Entering a quieter, covered walkway beneath the highway structure, the environment becomes more enclosed with artificial neon lighting replacing the natural sunlight. The area is nearly empty of pedestrians, with only the massive red support beams and glowing strip lights accompanying the path forward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a dim urban underpass into a bustling corporate district before retreating into a secluded, neon-lit corridor. It begins in a dimly lit concrete underpass with graffiti-covered walls, moving steadily toward a bright exit where golden hour sunlight streams in. As the camera emerges into the light, the scene opens to reveal the massive Arasaka building and red highway infrastructure, shifting right along a crowded sidewalk filled with pedestrians and futuristic vehicles. The camera then crosses a street intersection, leaving the dense crowds behind and turning left as the corporate tower recedes into the distance. Finally, the path leads into a quiet, covered walkway where natural sunlight is replaced by artificial neon strip lights and the oppressive presence of massive red support beams.
